TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Taromak ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Beinan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 493 buwan, 1,388 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 89% kyan ku 1,235 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 11% kyan ku 153 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Rukay 74%, Paywan 4%, Amis 3%, Bunun 1%, Puyuma 3%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Taromak hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Taromak hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Taromak hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Taromak hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Taromak hya' ga Likavung. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ taromak ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu βeinan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, rukaj **%, pajwan *%, amis~ɕ *%, βunun *%, pujuma *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na taromak ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na taromak ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na taromak ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na taromak ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na taromak ħjaʔ ɣa lika*uŋ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Taromak ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Beinan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 493 buwan, 1,388 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 89% kyan ku 1,235 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 11% kyan ku 153 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Rukay 74%, Paywan 4%, Amis 3%, Bunun 1%, Puyuma 3%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Taromak hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Taromak hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Taromak hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Taromak hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Taromak hya' ga Likavung. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ taromak ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu βeinan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, rukaj **%, pajwan *%, amis~ɕ *%, βunun *%, pujuma *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na taromak ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na taromak ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na taromak ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na taromak ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na taromak ħjaʔ ɣa lika*uŋ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
